recent_form_summary: Reached the Berlin final beating Siniakova, Keys, and world No. 1 Sabalenka 6-4 6-7(4) 6-0 in the semifinal.
stat_trend_summary: Hit 9 aces vs Sabalenka and totaled 12 aces across her first three matches (~4/match), solid but not explosive production this week.
opponent_factor_summary: Noskova is a strong, flat-hitting returner (leads H2H 2-1), though Pegula won their only prior grass meeting; could suppress some free points.
notes: Ace numbers this week straddle the 3.5 line -- the semifinal figure clears it comfortably but the tournament average sits closer to the number. Limited per-match sample, so moderate confidence.
